entry.title: hello
entry.content: Hello world! This is my first blog and I do not kown how to write it yet. <u>I feel sorry about it. But today is a meaningful date.</u> If you are reading this blog, I feel it an honor. Once-in-a-million. This is just miracle. 123456 #include <stdio.h> void main () {printf("hello world!");} 创建脚注格式类似这样 [^RUNOOB]。 [^RUNOOB]: 菜鸟教程 – 学的不仅是技术，更是梦想！！！带下划线文本 Wish we can company you from today on! ^from today on
